title: Neuberia marginata
taxonomy: Neuberia marginata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the genus Neuberia, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Neuberia marginata is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiosperms, and class Magnoliopsida. This plant is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, specifically in the Philippines. Its classification reflects its close relationship with other flowering plants in the Rubiaceae family.
